name: Nopalito Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups nopalitos, rinsed and drained, diced or
1 serrano chili, or small jalapeño, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled, about 2 hours. (The salsa can be prepared up to 6 hours ahead and kept refrigerated.)
4. Makes about 2 1/2 cups
5. Use this salsa as you would any other, with meats, chips, and tacos. If nopalitos are unavailable, substitute cooked green beans.
